subject: Re: hello there
body:
of course


----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, October 30, 2006 9:58:20 AM
Subject: hello there


hello hello,
   How was your weekend on the island? You're lucky, it was freezing here this weekend. I had a great weekend though.
  Adding to our previous conversation about Julian staying with me in New York, he was with me this weekend and I really enjoyed it. So would it be ok with you if julian stayed with me for the month that he's here? 
  Talk to you later.
